profile_data.headline: Senior Product Manager at Licious | Ex-Blinkit, Cars24, Airtel | IIT Kharagpur
profile_data.about:
Product leader with 7+ years of experience across early-stage startups, unicorns, and scaled consumer platforms. Proven track record in building 0→1 products, leading cross-functional teams, and solving complex problems across consumer experience, data products, supply chain, and internal platforms.

Obsessed with simplifying chaos, building systems that scale, and creating real-world impact through product thinking and system design.

multiLocaleHeadline.headline: Senior Product Manager at Licious | Ex-Blinkit, Cars24, Airtel | IIT Kharagpur

experience.description:
• Designed and launched the Reverse Stock Transfer Order (RSTO) system to reduce dead inventory, free shelf space, and salvage damaged stock - built picklist logic, discrepancy visibility, and skill-based execution. 
• Rolled out a dynamic task assignment engine - prioritized picking, putaway, and RSTO tasks based on surge, availability, and skill mapping.
• Built the Crate Pendency Dashboard to track filled, empty, and missing crates - improved reverse logistics and crate turnaround.
• Integrated with One Support for Admin ticketing - enabled skill-based task routing, SLA tracking, and internal audit trails.
• Created a consignment scheduling and visibility system - aligned manpower planning with warehouse arrival variability.
• Redesigned FnV Executive Home on StoreOps app - surfaced daily tasks, KPIs, and alerts to improve task adherence.
• Implemented auto-triggered FnV audits (expiry, quality) using dynamic SKU logic - improved early detection and stock actionability.
• Introduced Priority Crates flow - fast-tracked critical SKUs during putaway, reducing high-velocity item processing time by 20%.

• Spearheaded product strategy, planning, and development for the Seller experience on JioMart.
• Led the development of the Billing, Invoicing, and Payments module, optimizing financial operations.
• Led the development of comprehensive SX solutions including Seller/Brand Onboarding and Advertiser Account & User Management.

Led the product team for CARS24 Indonesia (cars24.co.id) and built the portfolio of consumer-facing and internal products from scratch. Managed product strategy, UI/UX research, and product hiring.

Led the product for BIKES24 (bikes24.com) - A platform to buy and sell pre-owned bikes
• Managed a team of product managers to build the user journeys - discovery,   consideration, checkout, fulfillment, and post-booking.
• Led the integration with LeadSquared Sales CRM which automated multiple sales processes and increased sales velocity.
• Built a hybrid Recommendation Engine to serve relevant bike recommendations on sections across the platform. Collaborated with the data science team to build an automated pricing engine and dynamic pricing system

• Leveraged Big Data technologies to build data products for the Airtel Home platform. Led a team of data engineers to build the Payment Pendency files, Customer 360 views, and Reconciliation systems.
• Built data products for the Airtel Work platform which enabled the omnichannel lead acquisition. Designed and built ETL pipelines for workforce analytics and business reports.

Dynamic Pricing infrastructure based on Reinforcement Learning (RL) 
• Implemented Q-Learning, a model-free RL algorithm
• Dynamically setting and reducing prices of 500+ inventory listings
• Higher margin and 30% reduction in inventory holdup period achieved
• Higher stock performance and lesser no. of price revisions required for sale

Built TruePrice: A data-driven pricing engine for used cars
• Achieved an accuracy of 94% across all car models and variants
• Integrated in all the systems and processes from car inspection to sale - Assisted the teams in procuring and listing used cars at fair prices

Stock Management App
• Gathered business requirements, managed a team of five engineers and led them in the development of interface & backend systems
• Collaborated with stakeholders and ensured successful product rollout and implementation

Procurement Score
• Developed a scoring model to compute the optimum initial listing margin to maximize margin while achieving the target stock performance.

• Developed a core product feature TruePrice (pricing engine for used cars) using machine learning techniques which achieved  an accuracy of 93% across all car models and variants, allowing the company to procure and list used cars at fair prices.
• Developed an automated deep analytics dashboard using Google Analytics Core Reporting API for visualization of weekly  conversion rates and funnels to track user progression.
• Received a certificate endorsing unparalleled enthusiasm for solving problems and quick learning abilities.

• Identified the causes of an in-house compressible flow simulation code HiPSTAR showing stability issues and fixed them.
• Received a letter from the Chair of Computational Mechanics commending high self-motivation and diligence.

• Applied mimetic spectral element method to solve Poisson equation over multiple elements on curvilinear grids in MATLAB.
• Received a letter of recommendation from the supervisor appreciating the proactive nature and quick pace of work.

projects.title: Development of 2D Compressible Navier Stokes Solver using MacCormack's Technique for Numerical Investigation of Shock-Wave/Laminar Boundary Layer Interactions
projects.description: Solved the set of 2D compressible Navier-Stokes equations using Mac Cormack’s technique which is a multi-level (predictor/corrector) scheme which uses forward difference approximation in one level (predictor step) followed by backward difference approximation in the next level (corrector step). The case of an externally generated shock wave impinging on laminar boundary layer on a flat plate was investigated using the solver.

receivedRecommendations.description:
Vaibhav is a true example of dedication, hard work, and enthusiasm at work. We worked both on a project as a very close friend, not a client. His Skill is pretty much visible in the kind of complex task. 
I wish him all the best for his future.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: VP (Product) - Used Cars at CarTrade Tech
receivedRecommendations.description: Vaibhav's dedication to build and improve things, is unparalleled, to say the least. He has been instrumental in building business critical data science capabilities at Truebil. It not only helped the company, save cost (majorly, marketing and operations) in various regards, but also  directly contributed to company's bottom-line significantly.

post_data.content:
At Licious, we’re building the future of food-tech. 

We’ve reimagined how India consumes meat & seafood – and now, we’re leveling up!

We’re on the hunt for Mavericks in Product Management, Design, and Product Analytics who are obsessed with:
 - Designing delightful customer experiences
 - Building scalable platforms for a complex, integrated supply chain
 - Turning insights into game-changing products

If you’re a builder, problem-solver, and storyteller who thrives on transforming customer journeys, you’ll love it here.
 What’s in it for you?
 -Own end-to-end product experiences for millions of customers
 -Work on category-first challenges in food-tech & commerce
 -Collaborate with a passionate, entrepreneurial team that loves food as much as tech
📍 Roles open in BLR :
Product Managers
Lead Product Designer, Senior Product Design
Lead Product Analyst, Senior Product Analyst

Want to join us? 
Please feel free to DM me, Prakhar Sharma, Pratik Vimal, Indu P, Sanaah Jain,Sanu Wilfred, Akshay Goyal, Vaibhav Ghiya, Manu lal, Yatin Garg, Gaurav Gupta, Shubham Pandey, Pradip Goyal for more details or write to careers@licious.com

author.name: Preetesh Saha
author.info: Director, Talent Acquisition | Global Tech & Product Hiring | Data-Led & Outcome-Focused

postedAt.postedAgoText: 10 months ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

repost.content:
Hello LinkedIn

We at Licious are hiring for PA, PM, and Product Design roles across levels! We’re on our journey of solving some tough and interesting problem statements across Search and Personalisation , Loyalty/ Gamification, Discovery and AI powered Shopping experiences.

If you thrive on balancing first-principle thinking with consumer insights (both data and instinct), and/or have a strong product intuition/design sense, and are endlessly curious about the possibilities of AI (agentic, generative, productivity, LTR/ML etc.) - this is the opportunity for you.
Come, be part of the team as we build, one of India's largest food-tech product.  
DM Preetesh or Indu P, if you are interested in any of the openings shared below in the comments section. We assure you , we’ll get back with an update.

In case you know someone who might be a great fit , please do share this with them.

Pratik Vimal Preetesh Saha Vaibhav Ghiya Gaurav Gupta Yatin Garg Shubham Pandey Pradip Goyal Manu lal Akshay Goyal

author.name: Prakhar Sharma

postedAt.postedAgoText: 10 months ago • Edited • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

post_data.content:
There is something deeply motivating about seeing conviction turn into momentum.

We've clocked ₹1,166 crore in net revenue in FY26, growing 47% year on year.

For us, this is so much more than a number. It reflects the trust millions of consumers place in us, the passion of our teams, and the strength of an operating model built brick by brick.

With ₹1,800 crore in sight for FY27, we are leaning even harder into micro-market scale, deeper urban growth, and repeat consumption.

Excited for what lies ahead, and even more excited about how we plan to build it!

Abhay Hanjura Vivek Gupta Shruti Marwaha Varun Khanna Ramya Segar Gaurav mathur Pratik Vimal Tavleen Bhatia Chiranjiv Mohanty Rohit Vaidya Chandramohan Ramadasan Naveen Kumar N Kaushik Roy

https://lnkd.in/g8UQ8_ha

postedAt.postedAgoText: 2 months ago • Edited • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn

post_data.content:
I’ve been watching the recent news of uncertainty in #Gaming Industry post the The Promotion & Regulation of Online Gaming Law, 2025. 

It’s tough seeing so much talent—creative thinkers, brilliant engineers, stellar marketers, designers, and product minds—facing unexpected challenges.

At Licious, we deeply value builders, storytellers, and innovators—the same skills that make gaming professionals extraordinary. 

We are all in this together ! ❤️

And we’re hiring across functions in BLR :
#Engineering
#ProductManagement
#Design
#ProductAnalytics
#Finance
#Marketing
#Category
#Business 
#Revenue #Growth
#Operations
#TalentAcquisition

If you’re looking for a place where you can solve meaningful problems and build products that delight millions daily (and yes, involve something as universal as food 🍗🐟), we’d love to chat.

Check out our open roles here:  https://lnkd.in/gitEmue7
Or drop me a DM/your resume
Let’s turn this uncertainty into your next big opportunity. 

Sanu Wilfred Naveen Kumar N Sanaah Jain Indu P Moushmi Priya Riya Singh Aenaaz Walloo Anshul Nema Bharathwaj Srinivasan Disha Devaiah Aswathi Babu M Sreelakshmi P V Pratik VimalGaurav mathurVarun Khanna Shruti Marwaha Ramya S. Chiranjiv Mohanty Ronit MangalRohit Vaidya Abhishek Joshi

#WeAreHiring #LifeAtLicious #FoodTech #Ecommerce #ConsumerInternet
